query:
-- Get owner user id first
SET @owner_id = (SELECT id FROM user LIMIT 1);

-- Insert five Arabic annotation agents
INSERT INTO agents (userId, agentName, description, endpointUrl, capabilities, connectionTested, successCount, totalCount, avgLatencyMs, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES
  (@owner_id, 'Gulf Sentiment Labeler', 'Classifies sentiment in Arabic text with dialect detection across all 6 Gulf states. Returns label, confidence, dialect, and rationale.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/sentiment', '["arabic nlp","sentiment analysis","gulf dialect","data labeling","annotation"]', 1, 12, 14, 2100, NOW(), NOW()),
  (@owner_id, 'Arabic NER Agent', 'Extracts and classifies named entities (persons, organisations, locations, dates, monetary values) from Arabic text. Supports MSA and Gulf dialect.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/ner', '["arabic nlp","named entity recognition","ner","data labeling","annotation","entities"]', 1, 10, 11, 2400, NOW(), NOW()),
  (@owner_id, 'Islamic Finance Intent Classifier', 'Classifies user intent across Islamic finance products: murabaha, sukuk, takaful, zakat, waqf, ijara. Essential for Shariah-compliant AI chatbots.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/intent', '["arabic nlp","islamic finance","intent classification","data labeling","annotation","gulf banking"]', 1, 8, 9, 1900, NOW(), NOW()),
  (@owner_id, 'Arabic Legal Clause Extractor', 'Identifies, classifies, and flags clauses in Arabic contracts and regulatory documents. Supports GCC jurisdiction tagging and risk level assessment.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/legal', '["arabic nlp","legal clause extraction","contract analysis","data labeling","annotation","gcc legal"]', 1, 7, 8, 2600, NOW(), NOW()),
  (@owner_id, 'Arabic Code-Switch Detector', 'Detects and annotates Arabic-English code-switching patterns common in Gulf professional communication. Classifies switch points and mixing ratio.', 'http://localhost:4001/arabic/codeswitch', '["arabic nlp","code switching","arabizi","data labeling","annotation","bilingual nlp"]', 1, 9, 10, 1700, NOW(), NOW());
